title: One Root
description:
For a fixed n and integers p and q such that |p| ≤ m and |q| ≤ m, how many equations of the form

xn + px + q = 0

have exactly one real root?
input: The only line of input contains two integers n and m (1 ≤ n, m ≤ 106, n ≥ 2).
output: Print a single integer: the number of equations having exactly one real root.
source: Camp, Petrozavodsk Programming Camp, Winter 2020, Day 4: Yandex Cup 2020
